name: MeowWare
short_description: A puzzle based clicker time attack game with nostalgic 1990's computer themes and cat culture. Click, type, and navigate through a litany of puzzles and memes to clear all the pop ups on screen!
detailed_description:
You just got home from work. You are exhausted from a long, hard day of scratching on things and knocking cups off of counters. You know the best way to relax are funny cat videos, so you launch your pc, but it's filled with MeowWare! You must clear the pesky pop ups as quick as possible so you can get to watching your favorite videos!

There are 4 different game-modes that you can select! Each one has unique gameplay and different potential pop-ups may appear!

The Speed Attack Game is a timed mode that makes you close all of the pop-ups as soon as you can! Your time is saved across 25 levels of difficulty!

The Adpocalypse Game is a Survival mode where you need to keep clearing pop-ups and try to prevent the screen from filling up with too many!

Zen is a casual Game where you can relax and close pop-ups at your own pace.

Training is another casual mode where you can practice the mechanics of specific popups, attempting to improve your abilities for the other game modes.

When you don't feel like clicking through hundreds of pop ups, you can relax and navigate through the desktop-like environment to see what is hidden in the folders and on screen.

As the game continues development, be sure to check back for new updates and features!
